name: claude-lab
description: Lorenzo Uriel's Claude Code configs: CompanyOS business skills, AgentSpec software engineering, and BR investments.

plugins.name: company-os
plugins.description: CompanyOS — skill-driven business operating system: 18 hub skills (content, social platforms, strategy, growth, fundraising, metrics, formats, ...) with 112 sub-skills.

plugins.name: tech-os
plugins.description: master-claude / AgentSpec — software-engineering config: 58 domain sub-agents, 5-phase SDD workflow commands, data-engineering knowledge base, pipeline-audit skill.

plugins.name: investments-os
plugins.description: BR investments config: 9 specialist agents (portfolio, renda fixa, ações, fundos, tributação), PT-BR knowledge base, portfolio/tax/analysis commands. Educational, not financial advice.
